title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
